description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push to the master branch, on pull requests, and on tag creation. The workflow has multiple jobs: lint on ubuntu-latest, build on a matrix of ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, and windows-latest, and separate jobs for emscripten, build-asan, and build-ubsan on ubuntu-latest. Each job sets up Python, checks out the repository, and performs specific build, test, and installation tasks.
